title: QuickScale
description:
QuickScale 是一款为 Minecraft Fabric 设计的效率工具模组，提供快速调整游戏交互范围与实体尺寸的快捷键功能，并支持实时配置。适用于建筑玩家、测试者和希望提升操作效率的玩家。
QuickScale is an productivity tool mod designed for Minecraft Fabric that provides shortcut keys to quickly adjust the game's interaction range and entity
body:
QuickScale Mod 简介

功能概述
QuickScale 是一款为 Minecraft Fabric 设计的效率工具模组，提供快速调整游戏交互范围与实体尺寸的快捷键功能，并支持实时配置。适用于建筑玩家、测试者和希望提升操作效率的玩家。

核心功能
⌨️ 快捷键系统

M 键：应用自定义方块交互范围（如延长/缩短挖掘/放置距离）  
N 键：应用实体交互范围（调整攻击/互动距离）   
X 键：一键缩放玩家模型尺寸   
G 键：批量调整附近实体尺寸   
Z/V 键：撤销最近一次缩放/范围调整   
C 键：快速打开可视化配置菜单   

⚙️ 动态配置   

通过内建配置界面（AutoConfig）实时修改所有快捷键与参数
支持保存多套配置方案，适应不同场景需求   

🔄 撤销系统

提供两级撤销操作，防止误操作导致的调整失误
同时支持范围调整与尺寸调整的独立回滚
使用场景

建筑模式：延长方块放置距离进行高空作业   
红石调试：缩放实体模型观察碰撞箱细节   
战斗测试：调整攻击范围验证游戏机制   
电影拍摄：快速改变实体尺寸实现特殊视觉效果   

安装要求   

Minecraft 1.21-1.21.1 Fabric 环境   
必需依赖：Fabric API, Cloth Config API   
推荐搭配：Mod Menu     

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------   


QuickScale Mod Introduction

Overview
QuickScale is a Fabric-based Minecraft mod designed to enhance gameplay efficiency through customizable interaction ranges and entity scaling. It provides instant hotkey controls and dynamic configuration, ideal for builders, testers, and technical players seeking precise control over game mechanics.

✨ Core Features  
⌨️ Key Binding System  

M: Apply custom block interaction range (extend/reach for building/mining)  
N: Adjust entity interaction range (attack/use distance)  
X: Scale player model size instantly  
G: Resize nearby entities in bulk  
Z/V: Undo latest scale/range adjustment  
C: Open in-game configuration GUI  

⚡ Dynamic Configuration  

Real-time adjustments via AutoConfig-powered GUI  
Save multiple presets for different scenarios (e.g., building vs combat)  

🔄 Smart Undo System  

Two independent undo stacks: Scale vs Range adjustments  
Prevents accidental permanent changes   

🚀 Use Cases  

Creative Building: Extend block placement range for large-scale projects  
Redstone Debugging: Shrink entities to inspect collision boxes  
Combat Testing: Modify attack ranges for mechanic verification  
Cinematic Creation: Create dramatic visuals with resized entities  

📦 Requirements   

Minecraft 1.21-1.21.1 (Fabric)   
Dependencies:   
Fabric API   
Cloth Config API (auto-included)   
Recommended: Mod Menu
